name: kiln-style-extractor-orchestrator
description: Opus-as-teacher labeler for Kiln's style-extractor distillation. The agent itself (Opus 4.7) extracts 6-axis style descriptors, distinctive n-grams, and a short markdown style card per text snippet, writes output to the container, and emits the labeled JSONL back to the caller via an agent message. Pilot: 300 samples.
